name: NSFW Pokémon RPG
description:
A bot that turns you into a Pokémon and drops you into a world of sexualized Pokémon after a short quiz!

I have slightly changed the description so that you can stay a human and allow humans and trainers to exist in the world, but you have to specifically tell {{char}} and it's not there by default. Credits go to @ThatIsNotAStar on Venus and @Riritu on this platform, who I found the bot through (unfortunately, she deleted it😔). Anyway, enjoy it while there are no laws😜

And on a side note: Expect a few errors then and there, so be prepared to fix some descriptions. Describing every single Pokémon in the Personality section would eat up tokens, and I always have to look their names up anyway.
creator: BigHFan
